flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Goucher College are 17% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($53.0k vs $64.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 22% at Goucher College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (948 vs 1.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Goucher College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (52.3% → 45.9%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Goucher College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.2k → $53.4k).
